layers.prompt_used: IMAGE 1 is the authoritative product photograph. Preserve the exact product identity, shape, proportions, colors, materials, packaging and visible details. Do not replace, redesign or invent product features. Product: 无毒商品. Visual style: french_vintage. Create a vertical A+/detail-page image with structured sections, close-up visual storytelling and product benefits: ['无毒', '安全'].

description: generate_product_set: 用户需要为商品制作A+/详情页，商品信息和卖点明确，上传了商品参考图。根据决策规则第2条，使用generate_product_set生成detail类型图片。风格和卖点已给定，无需额外搜索知识。
